summary: DrissionPage 4.2 is beta; MixTab functionality was merged into ChromiumTab; ChromiumOptions.set_browser_path has edge parameter; Chromium.new_tab has hidden parameter; click wait_stop defaults to False.

Local DrissionPage version is 4.2.0b3. Top-level ChromiumTab/MixTab are not exported. DrissionPage._pages.mix_tab.MixTab import fails. Clicker.middle(get_tab=True) static source returns a tab after waiting for new tab id, but real browser behavior still needs smoke verification.
